## 变更内容

- 

## 验证

- [ ] 后端：`python -m pytest tests -q`
- [ ] 后端：`python -m compileall -q app tests`
- [ ] Android：`.\gradlew.bat testDebugUnitTest`
- [ ] Android：`.\gradlew.bat :app:assembleDebug`
- [ ] 桌面端：`npm run typecheck`
- [ ] 桌面端：`npm run build`
- [ ] 安全治理：`npm run check:security-governance`
- [ ] 已检查 `SECURITY.md`、dependency-review、CodeQL、Scorecard、Trivy 相关影响
- [ ] 仅文档或配置变更，不需要运行上述命令

## 影响范围

- [ ] Backend
- [ ] Android
- [ ] Windows Desktop
- [ ] Widget
- [ ] Floating Window
- [ ] Docker / Deploy
- [ ] Documentation

## 备注
